original_details.observed_issue: v1 of the spec filtered actual options with grep -E "^\s+--", which excluded the argparse help row "  -h, --help" even though the expected option list included it.
original_details.impact_at_time: Step 7.3 could not produce CONTRACT MATCH as written.

resolution.resolved_by: spec v2 (2026-05-19) replacing the grep pattern with ^\s+(-h, --help|--)
resolution.reverify_command:
diff <(grep -E "^\s+(-h, --help|--)" eval-log/task/01/cli-contract-actual.txt | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]{2,}show this help message and exit$//' | sort) <(printf '  --allowed-prefix ALLOWED_PREFIX
  --fail-on-external
  --json
  --skills-dir SKILLS_DIR
  -h, --help
' | sort)
resolution.note: Abort condition is no longer in effect. Task 01 executed to completion and all 8 DoD items PASS. This file is retained as a historical record of the v1->v2 specification fix and is NOT part of Section 10 deliverables.
